name: Spawn Painting
desc: Spawns a painting entity with type, position, and facing direction.

implementation.overview: Spawns a painting entity. Painting art names: Kebab, Alban, Aztec, Aztec2, Bomb, Plant, Wasteland, Pool, Courbet, Sea, Sunset, Creebet, Wanderer, Graham, Match, Bust, Stage, Void, SkullAndRoses, Wither, Fighters, Pointer, Pigscene, BurningSkull, Skeleton, DonkeyKong. No known module from the examined client sources targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S10PacketSpawnPainting)
modules.purpose: Server sends S10PacketSpawnPainting to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
